corridor: [Default corridor view. Shown every move. Keep short.]
corridor_rest: [Rest area landmark. Kiosk, beds, clock, stairs, submission slot.]
corridor_bridge: [Floor 0 — can walk across the chasm here.]
kiosk_dark: [Kiosk is off — lights are out. Can't use it.]
kiosk_alcohol: [After drinking alcohol. Morale boost. Array for variety.]
submission_intro: [Submission slot screen. Where you try your book.]
win_release: [Win sequence line 1 — the slot accepts the book.]
win_through: [Win sequence line 2 — transition out of the library.]
win_light: [Win sequence line 3 — arrival, release, the end.]
sleep: [Sleep description. Array — add multiple for variety. Randomly selected.]
chasm: [Looking into the chasm from the railing.]
death_mortality: [Died from accumulated stat decay. Body gave out.]
resurrection: [Waking up at dawn. Restored. Still in the library.]
dead_npc_at_location: [Dead NPC body description. Shown after their name. Fragment.]
darkness_corridor: [Lights out, in a gallery corridor. Can't see. Navigating by touch.]
darkness_rest_area: [Lights out, in a rest area. Open space, darkness.]
darkness_no_read: [Lights out, trying to read. Can't see.]
despair_read_blocked: [Despairing — can't bring yourself to open a book. Array for variety.]
menu_new_game_confirm: Are you sure? All progress will be lost.
